markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Svelte

⚡ A curated list of awesome Svelte resources

Svelte is a new way to build web applications. It's a compiler that takes your declarative components and converts them into efficient JavaScript

Contributions welcome. Add links through pull requests or create an issue to start a discussion.

Contents

  • Resources

    • Community

Resources

Official Resources

  • Official Guide
  • API Reference
  • GitHub Repostars46.9k
  • Changelog

Community

  • Twitter
  • Discord
  • Reddit
  • Japan Discord - Svelte日本.

Conferences

  • Svelte Summit

Podcasts

  • Svelte Radio

YouTube Channels

  • Svelte Society
  • Svelte Mastery

Tutorials

  • Getting Started with Svelte 3 - DigitalOcean.
  • Building My First Svelte App - Scotch.io.
  • Develop a complete application with Svelte and TypeScript - MDN Web Docs.
  • An Introduction to Actions - Svelte School.
  • Svelte Tutorial for Beginners - The Net Ninja (YouTube).
  • Sapper Tutorial (Crash Course) - The Net Ninja (YouTube).
  • SvelteJS Series - tutorials and talks - SpinSpire (YouTube).
  • Svelte Stores - @lihautan (YouTube).
  • Svelte Actions - @lihautan (YouTube).
  • Svelte 101 - @lihautan (YouTube).
  • Learn Svelte by building a habit tracker app - RadDevon.
  • Meet Svelte 3, a Powerful, Even Radical JavaScript Framework - SitePoint, by Chrome DevTools engineer @Jack_Franklin.

Studies

Studies and research on the Svelte framework.

  • SvelteScaling - Does Svelte Scale?
  • Will it Scale?stars105 - Finding Svelte's inflection point.
  • JavaScript Frameworks Performance Comparison - Performance of Svelte and other top javascript frameworks.

Integrations

Preprocessing

  • svelte-preprocessstars1k - A preprocessor for PostCSS, SCSS, Less, Stylus, Coffeescript, TypeScript, Pug and much more.
  • MDSveXstars715 - Preprocessor for MDX markdown.
  • svelte-preprocess-markdownstars98 - Write Svelte components in markdown syntax.
  • svelte-preprocess-lessstars9 - Preprocessor for less.
  • modular-css - Preprocessor support for modular-css.
  • svelte-preprocess-postcssstars26 - Use PostCSS to preprocess your styles in Svelte components.
  • svelte-preprocess-sassstars80 - Preprocessor for sass.

Mobile

UI frameworks for mobile.

  • Svelte Native - Svelte controlling native components via Nativescript.
  • Framework7 - Full featured HTML framework for building iOS & Android apps.

UI Libraries

  • Svelte Materialifystars441 - A Material UI Design Component library heavily inspired by vuetify.
  • Sveltestrapstars580 - Bootstrap 4 & 5 components.
  • Smeltestars926 - UI framework with material components built with Tailwind CSS.
  • Svelte Material UIstars1.7k - Material UI Components.
  • carbon-components-sveltestars807 - Svelte implementation of the IBM Carbon Design System.
  • attractionsstars207 - A pretty cool and modern UI kit
  • svelte-chotastars187 - Component library built with Chota, a super light-weight CSS framework

UI Components

Table

Tables and data grids.

  • svelte-simple-datatablesstars67 - A Datatable component for Svelte
  • svelte-tablestars171 - A table implementation that allows sorting and filtering.
  • svelte-generic-crud-tablestars19 - Agnostic web-component for object-arrays with CRUD functionality. Sort and resize columns. Multiple tables per page.
  • svelte-generic-table-pagerstars1 - Svelte-generic-crud-table with paginator.

Notification

Toaster / snackbar - Notify the user with a modeless temporary little popup.

  • svelte-notificationsstars156 - Toast notifications component that can be used in any JS application.
  • svelte-favicon-badgestars69 - A custom component that adds a favicon and a badge that you can use to show for example number of unread messages, etc.

Grid

  • svelte-grid-responsivestars12 - Bootstrap-inspired responsive grid system.

Icons

  • svelte-fastars112 - Tiny FontAwesome 5 component.
  • svelte-simple-iconsstars9 - Simple Icons component.
  • svelte-awesomestars211 - Awesome SVG icon component, built with Font Awesome icons.
  • svelte-iconsstars96 - Icon components.

Calendar

Display non-editable events in a calendar.

  • svelte-fullcalendarstars69 - A component wrapper around FullCalendar.
  • svelte-calendarstars297 - A lightweight datepicker with neat animations and a unique UX.

Maps

  • svelte-googlemapsstars39 - Google Maps component.
  • svelte-mapboxstars121 - MapBox map and autocomplete components.
  • leaflet-sveltestars39 - Svelte wrapper for Leaflet.

Form

Lets the user create and edit data.

Checkbox

Switch / on/off toggle / checkbox.

  • svelte-checkboxstars47 - A checkbox component (cool animation, customizable).
  • svelte-togglestars15 - Basic toggle component with styling.

Scaffold

Templates / boilerplate / seed / starter kits / stack ensemble / Yeoman generator.

Client

Render Svelte application in the browser only.

  • sveltejs/templatestars1.1k - Template for building basic applications with rollup.
  • component-templatestars404 - A base for building shareable components.
  • svelte-component-templatestars233 - A base for building shareable components.
  • svelte-pwa-templatestars104 - A starter template for PWAs based in the official Template.
  • svelte-redux-toolkitstars2 - A starter template integrating Redux-Toolkit.
  • svelte-ts-eslint-prettier-templatestars9 - Starter template with TS activated, and ESLint and Prettier working together.

Universal

SSR framework.

  • sapper-template#rollup - The default Sapper template, available for Rollup.
  • sapper-template#webpack - The default Sapper template, available for Webpack.
  • sapper-firebase-typescript-graphql-tailwindcss-actions-templatestars111 - Template that includes Sapper, Firebase functions and hosting, TypeScript and TypeGraphQL, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, and automatic building and deployment with GitHub Actions.
  • sapper-mdsvex-templatestars12 - The default Sapper template with mdsvex.
  • sapper-tailwindcss-templatestars77 - The default Sapper template with Tailwind CSS.
  • sapper-typescript-graphql-templatestars87 - Template that includes Sapper, TypeScript preprocessing, and a GraphQL server through TypeGraphQL.
  • sapper-startstars28 - Sapper Rollup template with opinionated defaults such as SCSS support, shorthand paths, less boilerplate files and more.

Utilities

Form

  • svelte-forms-libstars262 - A lightweight library for managing forms.

WebGL

  • svelthreestars162 - Component library for declarative construction of reactive and reusable three.js scene graphs.

Portal

  • svelte-portalstars93 - Component for rendering outside the DOM of parent component.
  • svelte-teleportstars8 - A component to teleport elements across the DOM.

Routers

For Single Page Applications (SPAs) and more.

  • svelte-router-spastars338 - Router adds routing to your Single Page Applications (SPA). Includes localisation, guards and nested layouts.
  • svelte-routingstars1.3k - A declarative Svelte routing library with SSR support.
  • tinrostars407 - A tiny, dependency free and highly declarative router.
  • svelte-spa-routerstars787 - Optimized for Single Page Applications (SPA) with hash based routing and support for parameters.
  • svelte-client-routerstars7 - Svelte Client Router is everything you need and think when routing SPA's.

Frameworks

  • SvelteKit - The fastest way to build Svelte apps.
  • Sapper - The next small thing in web development, powered by Svelte.
  • Elder.js - Opinionated static site generator and web framework for Svelte built with SEO in mind.
  • Routify - Routes for Svelte, automated by your file structure.
  • JungleJS - The Jamstack framework for Svelte with GraphQL.

Dev Tools

Lint

Lint and format your code.

  • eslint-plugin-svelte3stars263 - An ESLint plugin for components.
  • prettier-plugin-sveltestars335 - Format your components using prettier.
  • svelte-check - Check your code.
  • eslint-plugin-sveltestars7 - An ESLint plugin for Svelte using AST.

Docs

Create documentation.

  • svelte-docsstars133 - A rapid way to write documentation for your Svelte components.
  • sveltedoc-parserstars54 - Generate a JSON documentation for your component.
  • svelte-docsterstars5 - Generate metadata about your Svelte files from jsdoc.

Test

  • svelte-jesterstars68 - A Jest transformer to compile your components before importing them into tests.
  • @testing-library/sveltestars389 - Simple and complete Svelte DOM testing utilities that encourage good testing practices.
  • jest-transform-sveltestars36 - Jest Transformer for Svelte components.

Editors

Text editor plugins.

Visual Studio Code

  • Svelte for VS Code - Provides syntax highlighting and rich intellisense for your components.
  • Svelte 3 Snippets - Svelte 3 Snippets for VS Code.

Atom

  • ide-svelte - Provides syntax highlighting and rich intellisense for your components.
  • language-svelte - Provides syntax highlighting for components, directives and other Svelte specific syntax in Atom.

Sublime Text

  • Svelte - Syntax highlighting and support for Sublime Text.

Vim

  • vim-sveltestars166 - Vim syntax highlighting and indentation for Svelte 3 components.
  • vim-svelte-pluginstars56 - Syntax highlighting and support for Vim.
  • coc-sveltestars86 - Syntax highlighting and support for (Neo)Vim.

JetBrains

  • Svelte - Syntax highlighting and support for JetBrains.
